title: Modpack 26
description: A modpack for Fabric for the SMP26
body:
**Modpack 26:** A modpack for Fabric for the SMP26.

**Features:**
- [Accessories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessorify) mod that allows you to put essential items in dedicated slots instead of cluttering your inventory
- [Chainmailed](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fluffpumpkin-chainmailed) mod lets you put chainmail armor on over other armor to allow more armor points
- Tonnes of new banner patterns
- [Camera Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/camerapture) to let you photograph your travels
- [Vertical slabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanted-vertical-slabs)
- Better horses with both [Superb Steeds](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-steeds) and [Horse Buff](https://modrinth.com/mod/horsebuff)
- Just enough extra ambient and visual particles
- [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)
- [Blooming Biosphere](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blooming-biosphere) and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) for terrain generation
- [Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/resource-backpacks) to fix the inventory space issue vanilla has
- [Map atlases](https://modrinth.com/datapack/just-atlas) because maps need a revamp
- [Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)
- [More fish](https://modrinth.com/mod/fish-of-thieves), [fish movement changes](https://modrinth.com/mod/boids), and fishing loot bundles
- [Fried eggs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/finally,-fried-egg!)
  
  And More...
